mapper.select: SELECT a.appointment_no, a.patient_no, a.doctor_no, a.appointment_dt, a.status, a.memo, a.created_at, p.name AS patient_name, d.name AS doctor_name, dep.department_name AS department_name FROM appointment a JOIN patient p ON a.patient_no = p.patient_no JOIN doctor d ON a.doctor_no = d.doctor_no JOIN department dep ON d.department_no = dep.department_no ORDER BY a.appointment_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appointment (patient_no, doctor_no, appointment_dt, status, memo) VALUES (#{patientNo}, #{doctorNo}, #{appointmentDt}, #{status}, #{memo})
